appname.title: Harmony Game
appname.subtitle: Easy musical learning
appname.description1: Unlock the world of musical harmony with Harmony Game.
appname.description2: Download now and dive into musical harmony with our groundbreaking learning app.

innovative.title: Innovative Visual Learning
innovative.description: Dive into the world of harmony through our visually intuitive graphs, derived from Ph.D. research. Experience music in a way that's both educational and visually stunning.

graph.title: Graphical Representation
graph.description: Explore musical concepts through interactive graphs, providing a unique perspective on harmony. This visual approach enhances your learning experience, making complex concepts easy to grasp.

simple.title: Simple and Beautiful
simple.description: Discover the world of musical harmony into a beautiful, user-friendly interface. Enjoy a seamless learning journey, where simplicity meets elegance.

offline.title: Offline Access
offline.description: No Web access needed. All content is available offline.

action.title: Download our app now!
action.description: Unlock the world of musical harmony with our groundbreaking learning app designed for those who aspire to understand harmony in a truly innovative way.
